title: Femtanyl Music Discs
description: This Resource Pack replaces minecraft's music discs with popular Femtanyl songs.
body:
This Resource Pack replaces Minecraft's Music Discs with popular Femtanyl songs!

  I put my personal favs on here, 
  I recommend that you lower your jukebox volume to about 70%    because the discs can be
  can be fairly loud. 

  **songs added: 
**
 
femtanyl - Girl Hell 1999

femtanyl - HEAD UP

femtanyl - DINNER!

femtanyl - IT'S TIME
